params.name: Time Crystal
params.description: The time crystal has more than four dimensions, always retaining a non-equilibrium state within its surroundings, and has an active space-time cycle. It can break timeline symmetry and change state according to temporal movement, but will ultimately resume its original shape, circling around just like a hand on a clock. Moreover, since it's in a state similar to perpetual motion, when the crystal is at its lowest energy point, energy is conserved within so as to not violate the law of conservati …
